selfRoles.title: Self roles
selfRoles.subtitle: Let members assign approved roles from a message in a text channel.
selfRoles.emptyDescription: Create a panel to let members choose their roles.
selfRoles.mappingHint: Each role and emoji can only be used once. Up to 20 mappings.

validation.title: Enter a panel title.
validation.mappings: Add at least one role mapping.
validation.roles: Each role can only be mapped once.
validation.emojis: Each emoji can only be mapped once.
